title: Documentation Down
excerpt:
Trying to access the documentation to begin upgrading our PHP application to GraphQL, and the API docs for v2 appear to be down 
  
Thanks!

posts.author: DavidAlberts (David Alberts)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: supernova (supernova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DavidAlberts the page is loading fine for me.
Are you still unable to access the doc?

posts.author: DavidAlberts (David Alberts)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes… looks like it’s down on Firefox only. Chrome/Edge works fine.

Edit: Cleared cache on Firefox and it’s back up.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DavidAlberts - welcome to the community!

I’m glad you were able to load the page after clearing your cache! I wasn’t able to re-create on my end, but if you run into this again please let us know.

-Daniel

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
